---
title: "Project Portfolio"
listing:
  contents: .
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 10 
---

This page serves my projects that I have worked on. These projects are a mix of personal and professional work, showcasing my skills in data engineering, distributed systems, and software development. Each project includes a brief description, the technologies used, and links to the code repositories or live demos where applicable.

## Latest Projects

:::{#listing}
:::

[← Back to Home](/)
